name: Afterpay have retired the Barcode payment method
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can understand the retirement of Afterpay barcode payment method and transition to alternative payment processing in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " to maintain seamless buy-now-pay-later transactions. This information helps prepare your retail operations for payment method changes, ensuring continued Afterpay support while updating checkout procedures to accommodate evolving payment technologies."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding Afterpay payment method changes involves reviewing alternative processing options, updating staff training, and adjusting checkout workflows. When properly prepared for these changes, you can expect maintained Afterpay payment capabilities, smooth customer transaction experiences, and continued competitive advantage in offering flexible payment options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Afterpay have retired the Barcode payment method"}], "data-id": "afterpay-have-retired-the-barcode-payment-method"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Afterpay retired the Barcode payment method on the 30th of September, which means to continue using Afterpay in-store you will need to upgrade to the Afterpay Card."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers are unable to load a barcode on their Afterpay app. Instead, customers will be prompted to install the Afterpay Card on their phones."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Afterpay payments online have not been modified."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retired Barcode method", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmHA3EAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmHA3EAM.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "afterpay_mobileapp_barcode.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Afterpay Card Method", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmEsmEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pmEsmEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "afterpaycard.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "What you need to do"}], "data-id": "what-you-need-to-do"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To ensure you're fully prepared for the transition we have included information below."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Processing In-Store Transactions"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "New method for Processing Refunds"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Processing In-Store Transactions"}], "data-id": "processing-in-store-transactions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have not already upgraded to Afterpay Card, you will need to do so to continue to process Afterpay Payments through Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.afterpay.com/en-AU", "children": [{"text": "Contact Afterpay"}]}, {"text": "to arrange your upgrade."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have been upgraded you will be able to continue to process Afterpay Payments as if you were processing any credit card transaction."}, {"text": "Click here for detailed information on using an Afterpay Card."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "New method for Processing Refunds"}], "data-id": "new-method-for-processing-refunds"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In-Store -", "bold": true}, {"text": " Transactions processed originally using the Barcode method will now be processed using Afterpay Card. Follow the steps in the article"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure your staff are aware they should not perform in-store transactions using the \"Afterpay\" Payment Type"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Online - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "There's no change to the refund process used for online sales - the refund will need to be managed in both systems independently. Follow the steps in the article "}, {"text": "Managing Afterpay/Zip Refunds in Shopify"}, {"text": ", or for any other Web Store platform, "}, {"text": "Managing Refunds/Cancellations of Web Orders"}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Future Updates"}], "data-id": "future-updates"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For the moment the Afterpay Payment Type remains fully available for reporting and recording online transactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the future, Retail Express will be transitioning this Payment Type from an integrated method to a non-integrated method. We will provide updates in the future on when this is available."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure your staff are aware they should not perform in-store transactions using the \"Afterpay\" Payment Type."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
